title: HCG Pack v3 Update 2012-12
description:
Update for ['HCG Pack v3'](http://sukebei.nyaa.se/?page=view&tid=89113). Includes CG sets from 616 games.  
Warning! This bulk package does not include character, background and system images. Unsuited for people who like to fill their hard disks with meaningless junk just 'for the sake of completeness'.  
List can be downloaded separately here - http://aaa.xost.ru/hcg/hcgpackv3\_upd2012.xlsx.7z  
(please click and 'save as')  
  
A few notes in case you have questions:  
1\. I did not rip the actual CGs.  
2\. Some CGs are bmps, others are pngs. I chose whatever compressed better in each case. Several CGs are jpgs - this is their original file format from game.  
3\. I made my own decisions in these situations (you may disagree with me in some cases):  
\- file naming convention and package format,  
\- brand names, subfolder sorting,  
\- removing unnecessary filler images  
4\. There could be some mistakes since I use a lot of scripts and physically cannot check every single thing.
